---
title: "SampleSet"
output: html_document
---

```{r} 
library(dplyr)
metadata <- read.csv("RawData/passportinfo 1.csv")
fam <- read.table("RawData/Wheat_all.fam", header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
metadata <- metadata[metadata$SeedID %in% fam$V1,]

# sampling 10% of each country
set.seed(10)
metadata_dev <- metadata %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  sample_frac(0.05) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(metadata_dev, "RawData/sample_metadata.csv", row.names = FALSE)

x <- read.csv("RawData/sample_metadata.csv")
```


```{r}
bim <- read.table("Data/Wheat_all_qc.bim", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
colnames(bim) <- c("chr", "snp", "cm", "pos", "a1", "a2")

set.seed(123)

dev_snps <- bim %>%
  group_by(chr) %>%
  group_modify(~ slice_sample(.x, n = min(500, nrow(.x)))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pull(snp)

write.table(
  dev_snps,
  "RawData/sample_snps.txt",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  col.names = FALSE
)
```
